name: google_linked user asks unrelated wellbeing question → no connect_workspace fire
description: Negative-case guardrail for the WORKSPACE-ASK TRIGGER directive (google_linked variant). Without this, a future prompt tweak might over-fire `connect_workspace` on any vague mention of work — a worse UX than the original silent-clarification regression. Asserts the agent emits a normal coaching reply (no tool calls) when the user's first message is purely about feelings / wellbeing / general planning. The trigger fires only on requests that genuinely need workspace data.
